sections.biography-source-undefined: Yan Xing was from Jincheng. He was later named Yan Yan, styled Yanming. He had a reputation for being robust in his youth, and began his career as a minor general under Han Sui. In the beginning of the Jian’an era, Han Sui and Ma Teng were attacking each other. Ma Chao, son of Ma Teng, was also praised for being robust. Yan Xing once stabbed Ma Chao. The lance snapped, so he used the snapped lance to stab Ma Chao in the neck, almost killing him.

full_text:
Yan Xing (Yanming) 閻行 (彥明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Xing (閻行), styledYanming (彥明), was born in Jincheng commandery. Fought Ma Chao hand to hand and nearly killed him, warned Han Sui against helping the Ma’s. Yan Xing was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.

BiographySource Undefined
Yan Xing was from Jincheng. He was later named Yan Yan, styled Yanming. He had a reputation for being robust in his youth, and began his career as a minor general under Han Sui. In the beginning of the Jian’an era, Han Sui and Ma Teng were attacking each other. Ma Chao, son of Ma Teng, was also praised for being robust. Yan Xing once stabbed Ma Chao. The lance snapped, so he used the snapped lance to stab Ma Chao in the neck, almost killing him.
